query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: Multiple figures of the same woman wearing a strapless floral dress appear at various positions in an outdoor nighttime setting near a building. Tall, narrow windows behind the subjects emit a warm yellow light. The woman is shown standing at the left edge, crouching lower left, standing in the center, and prominently at the right with her face turned upward. The background is predominantly black, with faint outlines of trees or distant architecture barely visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal, dreamlike nighttime photograph created through double exposure shows several overlapping instances of the same woman in a strapless floral dress scattered across a severely underexposed frame. Heavy film grain and motion blur soften the figures, while a sickly purple-blue cast unnaturally tinges the woman's skin and conflicts with the warm orange-yellow light spilling from the windows behind her. The oppressive darkness obscures most environmental detail, producing an atmosphere of unease and melancholic distress as the repeated subject gazes upward from multiple positions simultaneously.
